chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 333 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Disposed of matter For hearing of MA No.3259/2023 22.12.2023 Mr. Muhammad Qayyum Arain, Advocate for applicant/surety. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- This application has been filed by applicant Aftab Hussain seeking return of surety. As per contentions of learned Counsel for applicant, supported by report of Accountant of this Court, it appears that accused More Hussain and Rano alias Muhammad Usman were granted interim pre-arrest bail by this Court vide order dated 04.06.2021, for which applicant stood surety by depositing two original Defence Savings Certificates of Rs.50,000/- each. Thereafter, interim pre-arrest bail of former was confirmed, while interim pre-arrest bail of latter was recalled vide order dated 27.09.2021. Subsequently, both accused were convicted vide judgments dated 15.08.2022 and 30.01.2023 respectively, and sentenced to pay Arsh to the complainant party, which they have paid and released from jail. Learned Deputy Prosecutor General has extended his no objection to grant this application. Accordingly, listed application is allowed. Office is directed to return the surety documents, as above, to the applicant after proper identification and verification, as per rules. J U D G E Abdul Basit
